# CWE-368 safe — Context Switching Race Condition (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-368-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

var maintMu sync.Mutex
var maintEnabled bool

func RunMaintenanceShell(c *GinCtx) error {
	maintMu.Lock()
	defer maintMu.Unlock()
	if c.Request.Header.Get("X-Maintainer") != "yes" {
		maintEnabled = false
		return os.ErrPermission
	}
	maintEnabled = true
	if !maintEnabled {
		return os.ErrPermission
	}
	return os.Setenv("SHELL", "/bin/sh")
}
